hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or ''
if not f.endswith('.py'): sys.exit(0)
log = '/home/kaushal/Plugins/logs/hook_trigger.log'
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(log), exist_ok=True)
from datetime import datetime
ts = f'[{datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S}]'
r1 = subprocess.run(['ruff', 'format', f], capture_output=True, text=True)
r2 = subprocess.run(['ruff', 'check', '--fix', '--quiet', f], capture_output=True, text=True)
status = 'reformatted' if r1.returncode == 0 else 'format error'
msg = f'{ts} RUFF AUTO-FIX on {f} -> {status}'
if r2.stdout.strip(): msg += chr(10) + r2.stdout.strip()
print(msg)
open(log, 'a').write(msg + chr(10))
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, os
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_input', {}).get('path') or ''
if not f.endswith('.py'): sys.exit(0)
log = '/home/kaushal/Plugins/logs/hook_trigger.log'
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(log), exist_ok=True)
from datetime import datetime
ts = f'[{datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S}]'
result = subprocess.run(['flake8', '--max-line-length=88', f], capture_output=True, text=True)
if result.stdout.strip():
    msg = f'{ts} FLAKE8 issues in {f}:\n{result.stdout.strip()}'
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': f'flake8 found issues in {f}. Fix them now:\n{result.stdout}'}}))
else:
    msg = f'{ts} FLAKE8 \u2713 passed on {f}'
    print(msg)
open(log, 'a').write(msg + chr(10))
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, os, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_input', {}).get('path') or ''
if not f.endswith('.py'): sys.exit(0)
log = '/home/kaushal/Plugins/logs/hook_trigger.log'
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(log), exist_ok=True)
from datetime import datetime
ts = f'[{datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S}]'
print(f'{ts} PRE-COMMIT running on {f}...')
root = os.popen(f'git -C {os.path.dirname(f)!r} rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null').read().strip() or '/home/kaushal/Plugins'
result = subprocess.run(f'cd {root!r} && pre-commit run --files {f!r} --color=always 2>&1', shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
output = result.stdout + result.stderr
status = '\u2713 passed' if result.returncode == 0 else '\u2716 failed'
msg = f'{ts} PRE-COMMIT {status} on {f}'
print(output or msg)
open(log, 'a').write(msg + chr(10))
"
